dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The buildings that stand over Boardwalk Azure slowly leave your sight as you stray further from view. As you make your way towards Lake Ryoka, you consider the words of the vendor during your encounter the previous day. Although you enjoyed the bustling streets of Boardwalk Azure, you take the opportunity to exercise your backpacking abilities and trek through the beautiful, natural terrain.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Did he give me the wrong directions?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: You decide to take a shortcut towards Lake Ryoka. The path you take is relatively effortless, until you’re met with a short cliff, which is looming over you.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Great, my first obstacle! This should be a piece of cake since I bought that climbing rope yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: You start your climb after setting everything up.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Here we go...

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: My rope–!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: I’ve got you! Hrngh, I kind of need your help here too though…

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: That familiar feeling is back…

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mysterious man struggles to pull you up, but you eventually manage to grip the edge of the cliff, lifting yourself up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You notice the man hunched over on his hands on his knees, clearly out of breath.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I know I ate good last night, but not that good…

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Ah – really sorry about that. If it was any other day I’d pull up with ease, since my muscles are sooo strong, but I exhausted myself from chopping all this wood.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Alright, alright, I’ll stop with the jokes.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Don’t worry about it, I think I’m just still in shock with what just happened. Thanks for your help!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Of course, anytime!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Right, let me properly introduce myself. My name is Tora Guy, I give tours around Lake Ryoka, guiding people around all the natural scenery and stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: My name is Y/N.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Y/N! Hey, since you’re here, I’d love to give ya a tour! What’ya say?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wanted to take it easy and take the longer path down towards Lake Ryoka to enjoy the sightseeing. On your way, you admire the way the flowers dance with the wind, how the clouds follow alongside you, and the way the birds chirp their songs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, something has been bothering you the whole time. You feel as if someone has been watching you.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Why do I feel so uneasy right now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You take a slight step forward before abruptly stopping to the sound of rustling ahead of you.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Hmm…

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You confirm your theory one more time, and approach. You hear more rustling, followed by a THUMP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You turn around to a person, clearly disguised as a bush, who has fallen face-first into the dirt.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Are you…alright?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: *thumbs-up* Mm-hmph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a little suspicious, but being the good person you are, you help them up anyway

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: That familiar feeling is back…

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Care to explain why you were following me?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Ah! Let me properly introduce myself. My name is Tora Guy, I give tours around Lake Ryoka, guiding people around all the natural scenery and stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: My name is Y/N.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Y/N! And– well, what you’re seeing here is someone who has embraced nature to its fullest potential by becoming one with it!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: ...I see that.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: How could I give such good guidance around nature here if I’m not a part of it myself?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I don’t think a wild bush follows people around…

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Alright, alright, sorry if I creeped you out back there. You do look like you need a tour though, care to join me?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I guess I am a little lost...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You follow closely behind Tora as he leads you down a trail deeper into the forest. You can’t help but notice how he talks while you traverse. It feels almost as if he had been practicing prior to your encounter, yet he speaks with full confidence.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Aha! We made it. Welcome to the hot springs! It’s in a pretty odd place if you ask me, but who am I to complain?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: You’re a backpacker, right? I don't know how far you’ve traveled, but I bet you haven’t stumbled upon a hot spring in your other travels!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Hot springs are a great way to naturally relieve not only your physical pain, but they also reduce stress.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Hot springs can be a shared space, but I understand if you’d like to go on the other side of the border. I want to respect your space.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Thank you, I appreciate that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You finish undressing, keeping only your undergarments, and dip into the hot spring, letting out a deep sigh of relaxation.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Aaahhh ~ So, Y/N, what brought you here to Lake Ryoka?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I actually just came from Boardwalk Azure. I wasn’t going to head here originally, but, uh, some shady vendor managed to convince me to visit.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: *cough* That's odd... but the vendor is right, Lake Ryoka is a great place to visit and let your mind wander.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Y’know, a lot of people don’t actually like to sit with their thoughts or their feelings. It’s hard to sit in peace when your mind is so loud.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Sounds like you’ve been through it…

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Ha! Tell me about it. It can be difficult when you lose yourself to your thoughts, but acknowledging them is the first step. When you acknowledge your feelings, it's like acknowledging yourself. Many try to resist, but you can’t ignore it for too long.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: It's alright to feel uncomfortable with your thoughts. It's human nature to want to feel comfortable all the time, but how can comfort exist when you’ve never been uncomfortable?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Haha, sorry if I’m revealing too much about my thoughts. I haven’t had the chance to talk to anyone like this in a while.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Don’t apologize, I think a good way to acknowledge your feelings is to also talk about them. Besides, it's not very often I hear someone open up about themselves like this.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Ha! I think I’m falling for my own words, the hot springs really do relax you, so much so I’m out here thinking out loud! Y/N, have you been comfortable throughout your backpacking journey?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Ah…well, I’m not sure. I wanted to continue my backpacking trip, but I quickly realized I came unprepared. I’m a little low on money, so I’m trying to look for some odd jobs to do. That way, I can get back home faster.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Any luck so far?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Not really, but I got to meet some nice people at Boardwalk Azure. They offered to let me stay at their place for the night. I woke up pretty early to head this way.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Why in such a rush? The whole deal with backpacking is to be unprepared! Being uncomfortable with different settings is a part of the experience–

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before Tora could finish his sentence, he spots something floating towards him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: …it's a turd.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: EEEEEKKKKKKKKKKKK!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I’ve heard girls scream less girly than this…

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: AAAAAHHHHHH GET IT AWAY!!! AWAY I SAY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He frantically tries splashing it away.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: GAAAHHH!!! I MADE IT WORSE, IT'S COMING CLOSER TO ME!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In just one blink Tora had managed to latch himself on the side of the rocks.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Y/N!!! PLEASE YOU’VE GOT TO HELP ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: W-WHAT AM I SUPPOSED TO DO?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: CATCH ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hold out your arms, ready to catch Tora. He takes a leap of faith…

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THUMP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had plummeted straight to the ground.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: *out of breath* Are…you alright?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You give Tora a moment to recover.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Urgh, yeah, I’m alright.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of you make eye contact for a moment.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: AHAHAHHAHA!!!! THAT WAS SO STUPID BAHAHAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: HAHA! THERE WAS NO WAY I WAS GOING TO CATCH YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: *sighs* Geez, I haven’t laughed this hard in a while!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Me neither! You looked ridiculous!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Aw man, I totally forgot what I was going to say before I was rudely interrupted. Ah! You needed to make a quick buck or two? I sometimes manage a fish stall and I’m a bit low on supplies. If you help me catch some fish, I’ll pay you. How’s that sound?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Works for me!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Alright, let's get dressed and head down the lake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tora guides you further along the path. Hidden behind a few bushes is a dock decorated with two chairs, almost as if they had been anticipating your arrival. You take a deep breath, taking in the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Enjoying the view? It’s gorgeous, right?

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Yeah, it’s very…calming.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: We’ve already had our very ‘calming’ moment earlier, but now…

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tora rummages through his bag that had been hidden in some bush. He takes a second before taking out all his fishing gear.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: …we have to work hard to eat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After diligently fishing for a good hour, you had managed to catch four fish. It wasn’t bad for your first time.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: *clapping* With your fishing skills you’d send me into early retirement! You caught four fish, what an impressive count!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Here’s your money as promised. Since you caught four, I’ll pay ya $40.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Sweet~!

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: I caught a few myself for us to eat. I’ll get the fire going.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *fire crackling to life*

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: That should do it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and Tora slowly cook the fish together. You both watch the flames rise as they graze the spinning fish over and over again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There’s silence in the air. It isn’t the awkward type of silence, but the type of silence that reassures you. You are comfortable enough that Tora’s presence is enough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You take a moment to bask in the warmth of the crackling fire, letting relaxation find you again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tora looks up at you with only his eyes before lifting his head and giving a small smile. He is the first to break the silence.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: …Have you ever heard of the saying, ‘Many men go fishing all of their lives without knowing that it is not fish they are after’

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I-I don’t think so?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: What do you think it means— Actually, no, I’ll let you think about it yourself. I’d like to give you my thoughts on it. I’ll give you a moment to think about it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A minute passes.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: If it’s not the fish they’re after, then, what is it?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: I’ve been to many fishing spots, caught a decent amount of fish, yet, I don’t think it was ever the fish I got excited over…haha.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: This is going to sound corny, but— it’s more about the moment, where you are, who you’re with, and how you let that moment pass.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Oftentimes, people choose to stay in their own bubble and never experience the world to see for what it really is. Yeah, there are times where it gets uncomfortable, awkward even, but if you can’t handle these feelings now, when will you?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: You’re trying to head home, right? I hope you take my words into consideration. Sometimes the journey to your destination is what makes it worth arriving at. Just let the wind take you, wherever it may.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Thank you, I didn’t really think of it that way. I’ll take it into consideration.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of you enjoy your fish together, savoring every bite. After hearing what Tora said, his words are present in your mind.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I was thinking about what you said earlier, uhm, about seeing the world. I think… I’ll go explore some more.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Heh, I’m glad you’ve changed your mind. I’d show you around more but I have some stuff… to do. If you’d like, I do have a place in mind where you can head to next.

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: Where?

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: Komorebi Village, it’s just down south of here, shouldn’t take you that long to get to. I heard they had some type of festival going on tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Player
dialogue.text: I did come here pretty early. I should arrive before dusk, and I don’t want to interrupt whatever you have going on with your business.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tora walks you out of Lake Ryoka and gives you directions on how to get to Komorebi Village.

dialogue.speaker: Tora
dialogue.text: *waves* I wish you luck on your travels!
